---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

A clear description of the problem or limitation you're experiencing. For example: "I need to ... but currently ..."

## Proposed Solution

Describe the solution you'd like. Include API design, configuration options, or behavior changes if applicable.

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative solutions or workarounds you've considered and why they're insufficient.

## Additional Context

Add any other context, mockups, references to other projects, or relevant links.
